name: Claude

passive.name: Battle Side-by-side
passive.description: (Dexter) assists Claude on each of his Basic Attacks, dealing 20( +30% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to the same target (inherits a portion of Attack Effects).
passive.tips: Due to this skill, equipments that boost basic attacks should be Claude's major concentration

skill1.name: Art of Thievery
skill1.description: Claude emits a disruption wave in the target direction, dealing 160( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in a fan-shaped area and reducing their Movement Speed by 20% and Attack Speed by 10%. For each enemy hit, Claude gains 4% Movement & Attack Speed (doubled for enemy heroes hit) for 6s (up to 5 stacks).
skill1.tips: Due to this skill Claude is able to utilize his mobility to poke enemies from a safe distance.

skill2.name: Battle Mirror Image
skill2.description: Claude conjures a mirror image of (Dexter) at the target location that automatically attacks nearby enemies for 5.5s. The mirror image's Basic Attack deals 20( +30% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) and can trigger Claude's attack effects. (Use Again): Claude switches places with the mirror image.
skill2.tips: This skill can be used for multiple purposes. Claude can either dash into enemies to reap or flee from ambush. Use it unpredictably!

ultimate.name: Blazing Duet
ultimate.description: Claude and (Dexter) rapidly fire at nearby enemies for 3s, dealing 130( +10% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to up to two enemies with each shot (these attacks count as Basic Attacks). Claude also gains a 20( +3% Total Physical Attack) shield each time the Ultimate deals damage to an enemy.
ultimate.tips: The ultimate triggers the effect of basic attacks. So it works perfect with Demon Hunter Sword when facing single heroes. The skill hit 2 enemies at most at the same moment, so Claude should release this skill to an area with less than 2 enemies. The ultimate also provides a shield so Claude's durability is ensured in all conditions.

mechanicNote: Claude adalah marksman dengan DPS tinggi yang menjadi win condition utama di late game.
